Set in the near future, the stories revolve around the evil corporation, 4Ever Innovations, whose young and brilliant scientists download and sell memories. They replace those we've lost with clones and devise technology that helps us live out our greatest fantasies; from saving a failed relationship, to creating the perfect lover, to being irresistible to the opposite sex - but sometimes our deepest desires come at a terrible price. 4Ever offers customers the opportunity to live out their fantasies in a virtual world but there are secrets within 4Ever Innovations that may cost you your life.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Surviving Mann returns with its most punishing season opener yet. In true Don Mann fashion, the bar is raised with a grueling 10-part physical readiness test—infused with a blast of hypothermia for good measure. Don himself calls it “the most brutal PT [he’s] ever witnessed,” and it’s clear the contestants are in for a world of hurt. To push them even further, MMA legend Ken Shamrock joins the fray, bringing his no-nonsense intensity to whip the group into fighting shape. Those who survive the trial by ice and exertion are rewarded with a chance to test-fire the lightest AR on the market—if they can still feel their trigger fingers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: Back by unpopular demand, the infamous “Blah Line” returns—and it’s more brutal than ever. The contestants kick off the day with a hellish PT session that leaves bodies broken and spirits tested. Things only get rougher from there with a punishing stealth crawl over jagged rocks, grinding them down before they face Ken Shamrock’s infamous Lion’s Den training—a relentless gauntlet of pain, grit, and raw endurance. As Don Mann continues to forge a battle-ready team, the squad is thrown into breaching drills designed for high-stakes mission execution. It’s chaos, it’s calculated, and it separates the contenders from the pretenders. In the heat of the action, two standouts emerge from the ranks—earning the coveted role of designated breachers.

programme.title: Surviving Mann

Under the guidance of survival expert Don Mann, they face a series of challenges designed to push them beyond their limits. Each contestant must adapt, innovate, and collaborate to survive in an unforgiving environment. As the grueling challenges unfold, they discover new strengths and forge deeper bonds. This episode sets the tone for a season filled with intense tests of endurance, strategy, and resilience, with Don Mann inspiring and pushing them every step of the way.

programme.title: Around the ACL
programme.desc: ATA 226: Worlds Are Next: Final Rankings & Stevie Award Predictions With the ACL World Championships just around the corner, this week on Around The ACL, Jake, Meesh, and Anthony break down the final Singles rankings and discuss who has positioned themselves as the player to beat heading into the biggest event of the season. From Logan Chamberlain and Colin Hodet to Mark Richards, Zack Aiken, and Gabriel Clauson, the crew debates who has the momentum and who still has something to prove. The show also takes a look at the Pro Invitational teams and what fans should be watching as the sport's top players prepare to battle for a World Championship. To close out the episode, the hosts cast their ballots for the Around The ACL Stevie Awards. They debate the fan-nominated finalists for Game of the Year, Shot of the Year, Breakout Player, Rookie of the Year, and MVP while revisiting some of the biggest moments and performances from an unforgettable ACL season. Join us as we celebrate the season that was and look ahead to the biggest week in cornhole.

programme.title: Hogslayer
programme.desc: The award-winning true-life story of the dual-engine Norton motorcycle dragster designed, built, and raced by TC Christenson and John Gregory of Sunset Motors. The documentary chronicles the Sunset Motors Racing Team’s unrivaled innovation and unbridled courage as they faced unyielding challengers throughout the United States and Europe in the 1970’s. TC and John are featured as they relate their experiences of those years rising from local street racers to the top race team in the world. This is bench-racing at its best directly from the original Sunset Motors in Kenosha, Wisconsin, home of the Hogslayer.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 6 Denver McKee
programme.desc: After a series of raids and cattle thefts plague the area, the Cartwrights seek the help of their neighbor, Denver McKee, a retired U.S. Deputy Marshal. While McKee leads various posses in search of the culprits, he remains suspiciously unable to find them. It is eventually revealed that McKee is secretly leading the outlaw gang responsible for the crimes, driven by a desperate need for money to provide for his daughter, Connie, who has recently returned home from school in the East

programme.title: Rifleman S1E15 The Pet
programme.desc: Mark finds a stray dog in the woods and brings it home, hoping to keep it as a pet. However, the dog turns out to be a vicious animal that had been attacking local livestock, leading the townspeople and Lucas to deal with the danger the dog poses to the community.

programme.title: Bonanza Season 2 Episode 10 The Last Viking
programme.desc: Gunnar Borgstrom, a powerful relative and secret outlaw leader, arrives at the Ponderosa. His gang unknowingly kidnaps Little Joe and his girlfriend, forcing the Cartwrights into a tense confrontation once the familial connection is revealed.

programme.title: Wagon Train S7E32 The Last Circle Up

programme.title: The Crooked Trail

programme.title: Terror at Black Falls
programme.desc: In this western, a Mexican gunslinger is injured trying to save his son and put into prison. When he's released, he's got revenge on his mind.

programme.title: The Cowboy and the Bandit
programme.desc: Bill travels to a new state after the outlaw Scarface saves him from a lynch mob. There he takes a job on the Barton ranch and joins in the fight against gang leader Larkin. Finding a wounded Scarface he helps him recover. Arrested by Larkin's stooge Sheriff, and with another lynch mob after him, he once again needs Scarface's help

programme.title: The Price of Power 1969
programme.desc: In The Price of Power, Giuliano Gemma stars in a gripping Spaghetti Western that blends frontier action with political intrigue. Set against the backdrop of President James Garfield’s visit to Texas, a deadly conspiracy unfolds as ruthless enemies plot an assassination. Caught between gunmen, corruption, and betrayal, one man fights to uncover the truth and deliver justice. With explosive shootouts, sweeping style, and echoes of real history, this is a Western where the cost of freedom comes high.
